image_prompt: A humorous, exaggerated scene. A sleepy, disheveled person (or a cartoon character resembling a human) is slumped over a desk, surrounded by steam rising from an enormous, overflowing coffee cup. As they take a sip, a literal "lightbulb" appears above their head, and their eyes pop open wide with a jolt of energy. The Portuguese sentence "O café te acorda." is boldly displayed on the side of the coffee mug, as if it's a brand slogan. The colors are warm and inviting, but the energy is dynamic.
caption: Se você não concorda, provavelmente não tomou seu café ainda! ☕️ Aquele empurrãozinho essencial para encarar o dia. Qual é a sua dose de magia matinal? Conta pra gente! 👇 #CaféDaManhã #AcordaPraVida #VícioBom #EnergiaExtra #VerdadesDoDiaADia
